title: Coelogyne dewindtiana
taxonomy: Coelogyne dewindtiana is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus, Coelogyne, is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. More specifically, Coelogyne dewindtiana is classified within the tribe Coelogyneae, which is further divided into several subtribes and genera. The exact classification of Coelogyne dewindtiana can be broken down into the following taxonomic ranks: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subfamily: Epidendroideae, Tribe: Coelogyneae, Subtribe: Coelogyneinae, and Genus: Coelogyne. Coelogyne dewindtiana is a species within the genus Coelogyne.

In addition, Coelogyne dewindtiana is thought to have antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage.
